good_synth_eval_2026_05_26.note: new harness (whitespace-tolerant SEARCH/REPLACE edit), same-task memory, k=1; control/good re-run under the new harness alongside good_synth for an internally-consistent 3-way. gpt-oss control reuses headline 0/17.
good_synth_eval_2026_05_26.finding: good_synth (abstract) does NOT lift over good (prose): ties on gpt-oss 4=4, loses on gemma 3<5. But the two representations are COMPLEMENTARY -- each solves 2 tasks the other misses; union = 6/17 on both models. Direction: keep multiple representations / push synthesis toward structured ready-to-apply patches, not abstraction.

good_loop_eval_2026_05_26.note: good_loop = SAME general abstract knowledge as good_synth + harness-owned apply->verify->retry->done-gate->rollback. Verification = public repro (command/expected/buggy from synth_cache), NOT the hidden grading test. Only the execution CONDITION changes; knowledge unchanged.
good_loop_eval_2026_05_26.finding: The execution/iteration CONDITION is the real lever, and it does NOT narrow knowledge. With the SAME general abstract knowledge, harness-owned verify+retry+rollback lifts good_synth +3 (gpt-oss) / +2 (gemma), most on the weaker model. good_loop 7/17 is the best NON-CACHE arm and beats prose good (4) on gpt-oss. Same lever as oracle->good_apply (+12-15) but on general knowledge instead of a same-task cached patch. Caveat: public repro is necessary-not-sufficient -- gemma passed repro on 9 but resolved 5 (under-specified repro -> overfit); gpt-oss resolved 7 but the substring check only registered 5 (false negatives). Ceiling still bounded by irreducible multi-site localization/diagnosis (5-7 << Opus 17).

good_loop_v2_multi_repro_eval_2026_05_26.note: good_loop v2 = SAME general knowledge as good_synth + harness verify->retry->rollback, but the verification suite is now a LIST of 2-5 INDEPENDENT repros per memory (one per localization_cue / fix site). PASS iff EVERY repro passes. `expected` also accepts a list of alternative substrings (fixes v1's substring false-negatives). Knowledge unchanged; only the verification regime tightened.
good_loop_v2_multi_repro_eval_2026_05_26.finding_1_asymmetry: Multi-repro is MODEL-asymmetric, not monotonically better: gemma (reliable instruct) +2 from forced multi-site coverage; gpt-oss (flaky reasoning) -2 because the stricter all-pass bar amplifies parse_failures and pushes single-site cases out of budget. The verification regime must match the model's iteration reliability.
good_loop_v2_multi_repro_eval_2026_05_26.finding_2_complementarity: Different verifications/representations cover DIFFERENT failure modes -- v1 ∪ v2 jumps to 9-10/17 on both models, well above any single arm. Full arm union (good prose + good_synth + v1 + v2) hits gpt-oss 12/17 (71% of Opus) on the SAME general knowledge, using only different presentations + verification regimes. Direction: ensemble / arm-router (learned per-task), not 'find the right single arm'.
